description: Complete the loan amortization schedule in /home/ga/Documents/loan_amortization.xlsx using the provided parameters (Amount: $485,000, Rate: 7.25%, Term: 60 months). Starting at row 20, generate a 60-month amortization table including Month, Monthly Payment, Interest Portion, Principal Portion, Ending Balance, and Cumulative Interest. Include a summary section around row 82 showing Total Payments, Total Interest, and Total Principal. Create a chart visualizing the declining loan balance over the 60-month term and save the file.
